pve_actions.name: Keen Edge
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.

pve_actions.name: No Mercy
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by 20%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Ready to Break
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Brutal Shell
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Combo Action: Keen Edge
Combo Potency: 380
Combo Bonus: Restores own HP
Cure Potency: 200
Combo Bonus: Creates a barrier which nullifies damage equaling HP restored
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Camouflage
pve_actions.effect:
Increases parry rate by 50% while reducing damage taken by 10%.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Demon Slice
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity

pve_actions.name: Royal Guard
pve_actions.effect:
Significantly increases enmity generation.
Effect ends upon reuse.

pve_actions.name: Release Royal Guard
pve_actions.effect: Cancels the effect of Royal Guard.

pve_actions.name: Lightning Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a ranged attack with a potency of 150.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity

pve_actions.name: Danger Zone
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 250.

pve_actions.name: Solid Barrel
pve_actions.combo_bonus: Adds a Cartridge to your Powder Gauge
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Combo Action: Brutal Shell
Combo Potency: 460
Combo Bonus: Adds a Cartridge to your Powder Gauge

pve_actions.name: Burst Strike
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 420.
Additional Effect: Grants Ready to Blast
Duration: 10s
Effect of Ready to Blast ends upon execution of any weaponskill.
Cartridge Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Nebula
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 30%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Demon Slaughter
pve_actions.combo_bonus: Adds a Cartridge to your Powder Gauge
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity
Combo Action: Demon Slice
Combo Potency: 160
Combo Bonus: Adds a Cartridge to your Powder Gauge

pve_actions.name: Aurora
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Regen to target.
Cure Potency: 300
Duration: 18s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Superbolide
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces HP by 50% of maximum and renders you impervious to most attacks.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Sonic Break
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 340.
Additional Effect: Damage over time
Potency: 120
Duration: 15s
Can only be executed when Ready to Break.

pve_actions.name: Trajectory
pve_actions.effect:
Rush to a targeted enemy's location.
Additional Effect: Increased enmity
Maximum Charges: 2
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Gnashing Fang
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 440.
Additional Effect: Grants Ready to Rip
Duration: 10s
Effect of Ready to Rip ends upon execution of any weaponskill.
Cartridge Cost: 1
Maximum Charges: 2
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Savage Claw
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 500.
Combo Action: Gnashing Fang
Combo Bonus: Grants Ready to Tear
Duration: 10s
Effect of Ready to Tear ends upon execution of any weaponskill.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Gnashing Fang changes to Savage Claw when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Wicked Talon
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 560.
Combo Action: Savage Claw
Combo Bonus: Grants Ready to Gouge
Duration: 10s
Effect of Ready to Gouge ends upon execution of any weaponskill.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Savage Claw changes to Wicked Talon when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Bow Shock
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 150 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Damage over time
Potency: 60
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Heart of Light
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces physical damage taken by 5% and magic damage taken by 10% for self and nearby party members.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Heart of Stone
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by a party member or self by 15%.
Duration: 7s
Additional Effect: When targeting a party member while under the effect of Brutal Shell, that effect is also granted to the target
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Continuation
pve_actions.effect:
Allows the firing of successive rounds with your gunblade.
Gnashing Fang may be followed by Jugular Rip.
Savage Claw may be followed by Abdomen Tear.
Wicked Talon may be followed by Eye Gouge.
Burst Strike may be followed by Hypervelocity.
Fated Circle may be followed by Fated Brand.

pve_actions.name: Jugular Rip
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 220.
Can only be executed when Ready to Rip.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Continuation changes to Jugular Rip when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Abdomen Tear
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 260.
Can only be executed when Ready to Tear.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Continuation changes to Abdomen Tear when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Eye Gouge
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
Can only be executed when Ready to Gouge.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Continuation changes to Eye Gouge when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Fated Circle
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Ready to Raze
Duration: 10s
Effect of Ready to Raze ends upon execution of any weaponskill.
Cartridge Cost: 1

pve_actions.name: Bloodfest
pve_actions.effect:
Draws aetheric energy from target, adding 3 Cartridges to your Powder Gauge, and increasing maximum Cartridges to 6.
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Ready to Reign
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Blasting Zone
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 800.

pve_actions.name: Heart of Corundum
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by target party member or self by 15%.
Duration: 8s
Additional Effect: When targeting a party member while under the effect of Brutal Shell, that effect is also granted to the target
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Clarity of Corundum to target
Clarity of Corundum Effect: Reduces damage taken by 15%
Duration: 4s
Additional Effect: Grants Catharsis of Corundum to target
Catharsis of Corundum Effect: Restores HP when HP falls to 50% or below, or upon effect duration expiration
Cure Potency: 900
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Hypervelocity
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180.
Can only be executed when Ready to Blast.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Continuation changes to Hypervelocity when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Double Down
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all nearby enemies with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 15% less for all remaining enemies.
Cartridge Cost: 2
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Great Nebula
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 40%.
Additional Effect: Increases maximum HP by 20% and restores the amount increased.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Fated Brand
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Can only be executed when Ready to Raze.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Continuation changes to Fated Brand when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Reign of Beasts
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed when Ready to Reign.

pve_actions.name: Noble Blood
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 900 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Combo Action: Reign of Beasts

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Reign of Beasts changes to Noble Blood when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Lion Heart
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 60% less for all remaining enemies.
Combo Action: Noble Blood

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Noble Blood changes to Lion Heart when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Rampart
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 20%.
Additional Effect: Increases HP recovery via healing actions on self by 15%
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Low Blow
pve_actions.effect:
Stuns target.
Duration: 5s

pve_actions.name: Provoke
pve_actions.effect: Gesture threateningly, placing yourself at the top of a target's enmity list while gaining additional enmity.

pve_actions.name: Interject
pve_actions.effect: Interrupts the use of a target's action.

pve_actions.name: Reprisal
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage dealt by nearby enemies by 10%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Shirk
pve_actions.effect: Diverts 25% of enmity to target party member.

traits.name: Tank Mastery
traits.effect: Reduces damage taken by 20%. Furthermore, grants a bonus to maximum HP based on your vitality attribute, and a bonus to damage dealt based on your strength attribute.

traits.name: Cartridge Charge
traits.effect:
Stores a Cartridge in your Powder Gauge after successfully completing a combo with Solid Barrel.
Maximum Cartridges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Brutal Shell
traits.effect:
Grants the effect of Brutal Shell after successfully completing a combo with Brutal Shell.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced No Mercy
traits.effect:
Become Ready to Break after executing No Mercy.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Danger Zone Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Danger Zone to Blasting Zone.

traits.name: Heart of Stone Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Heart of Stone to Heart of Corundum.

traits.name: Enhanced Aurora
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Aurora.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Melee Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Keen Edge to 200, Brutal Shell to 160, and Solid Barrel to 140.

traits.name: Enhanced Continuation
traits.effect:
Become Ready to Blast after executing Burst Strike.
Duration: 10s
Continuation changes to Hypervelocity while under the effect of Ready to Blast.

traits.name: Cartridge Charge II
traits.effect:
Increases Powder Gauge capacity to 3 Cartridges. While under the effect of Bloodfest, increases the maximum capacity to 6.
Executing Bloodfest stores 3 Cartridges.

traits.name: Melee Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Keen Edge to 300, Brutal Shell to 240, Solid Barrel to 240, Burst Strike to 420, Gnashing Fang to 440, Savage Claw to 500, Wicked Talon to 560, Jugular Rip to 220, Abdomen Tear to 260, Eye Gouge to 300, Blasting Zone to 800, and Hypervelocity to 180.

traits.name: Enhanced Continuation II
traits.effect:
Become Ready to Raze after executing Fated Circle.
Duration: 10s
Continuation changes to Fated Brand when Ready to Raze.

traits.name: Enhanced Bloodfest
traits.effect:
Grants the effect of Ready to Reign after executing Bloodfest.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Rampart
traits.effect: Adds an additional effect to Rampart that increases HP recovery via healing actions on self by 15%.

traits.name: Enhanced Reprisal
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Reprisal to 15 seconds.
